case_title: ARROW CHECKER CAB CO. VS. SARAH HASS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,211.84 FILED BY ARROW CHECKER CAB CO. AS TO DEFENDANT HASS, SARAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PETER JACOBS.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW CHECKER CAB CO. AS TO DEFENDANT HASS, SARAH

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW CHECKER CAB CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROW CHECKER CAB CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASS, SARAH $6,211.84 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,296.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HASS, SARAH
